subject: [AAI] Docker image updates for package upgrades for security reasons
commit_message:
[AAI] Docker image updates for package upgrades for security reasons

Babel, schema-service, resources, traversal,
and graphadmin docker images updated to get
log4j version updates and other package
updates based on security violations

Issue-ID: AAI-3431
Signed-off-by: wr148d <wr148d@att.com>
Change-Id: Iacd476bb2f70af1524878a887bfac669cc45f3fb

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1
> 
> May this be approved/merged? The only issue I see is something in error is something about dcae, these versions passed on master, this was the cherry-pick to Istanbul.

This build error is a transient issue, we have seen it earlier and rebuild has cleared the problem. May need help with OOM/LF team for identifying the rootcause as this is not locally reproducible. 

In anycase I don't see this error should block merge as the patch is unrelated to the error
